root_cause: CVR fell −2.07pp (4.65%→2.59%) because Google Ads traffic to newyorktickets.com/empire-state-building collapsed 58% (1,186→499 users), shifting the paid/organic mix from 80/20 to 51/49. Google Ads users have ~8× higher CVR than organic; the mix shift mechanically pushed blended CVR down. Product funnel was intact — Google Ads CVR held at 5.6–5.8%, S2C flat. Sharp break from April 26. A Google Ads budget reduction or campaign pause is the proximate cause.
